_meta.purpose: Source-of-truth capability map. Each capability_id is the join key for proposal authoring (Vol 2 §1, §2, §3, §6 + Vol 5 §5.2 + cost-volume scoping). Templates pull capability paragraphs and PI bio paragraphs by capability_id.
_meta.review_cycle: Update on each Phase I/II submission. Annual full review.

_archive_capabilities._note: Capabilities mentioned in V4.1 brand line that are not currently positioned for SBIR/grant work. Listed for completeness; not joined to active proposal templates. The former archived slug 'cairn' conflicts with the canonical repository name and has been renamed here for historical disambiguation.
